l7:ResourceSet.l7:Resource:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy"> <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required"> <!-- Require HTTPS --> <L7p:SslAssertion> <L7p:RequireClientAuthentication booleanValue="false"/> </L7p:SslAssertion>
<!-- Extract HTTP Basic credentials --> <L7p:HttpBasic/>
<!-- Authenticate against internal identity provider --> <L7p:Authentication> <L7p:IdentityProviderOid goidValue="0000000000000000fffffffffffffffe"/> </L7p:Authentication>
<!-- Rate limit: 100 requests per second --> <L7p:RateLimit> <L7p:MaxRequestsPerSecond intValue="100"/> <L7p:CounterName stringValue="api-users-counter"/> <L7p:Hardwired booleanValue="true"/> </L7p:RateLimit>
<!-- CORS --> <L7p:CorsAssertion> <L7p:AcceptedOrigins> <L7p:item stringValue="https://app.example.com"/> <L7p:item stringValue="https://admin.example.com"/> </L7p:AcceptedOrigins> <L7p:AcceptedMethods> <L7p:item stringValue="GET"/> <L7p:item stringValue="POST"/> <L7p:item stringValue="PUT"/> <L7p:item stringValue="DELETE"/> </L7p:AcceptedMethods> <L7p:MaxAge intValue="3600"/> <L7p:AllowCredentials booleanValue="true"/> </L7p:CorsAssertion>
<!-- Limit request size to 10MB --> <L7p:RequestSizeLimit> <L7p:MaxSize intValue="10485760"/> </L7p:RequestSizeLimit>
<!-- Add correlation header --> <L7p:AddHeader> <L7p:HeaderName stringValue="X-Request-Id"/> <L7p:HeaderValue stringValue="${request.id}"/> <L7p:Target stringValue="request"/> </L7p:AddHeader>
<!-- Route to backend --> <L7p:HttpRoutingAssertion> <L7p:ProtectedServiceUrl stringValue="https://backend-users.internal:8443/api/v1/users"/> <L7p:TlsVersion stringValue="TLSv1.2"/> <L7p:ConnectionTimeout intValue="30000"/> <L7p:Timeout intValue="60000"/> <L7p:FollowRedirects booleanValue="false"/> </L7p:HttpRoutingAssertion>
<!-- Audit the request --> <L7p:AuditDetailAssertion> <L7p:Detail stringValue="API request processed for ${request.http.uri}"/> <L7p:Level stringValue="INFO"/> </L7p:AuditDetailAssertion> </wsp:All> </wsp:Policy>
